name: Fast Track Specialists
description_short: Fast Track Specialists is a credit repair provider based in Phoenix, Arizona. Rated 4.0/5 on Google.
description_long:
Fast Track Specialists is a credit repair provider serving clients in Phoenix, Arizona. The company serves consumers in the Phoenix area who are looking to repair and improve their credit scores.

Operating as a business to business service, Fast Track Specialists provides a range of services for consumers seeking credit repair solutions. Additional information about their services and processes can typically be found on their website.

When evaluating credit repair services in Phoenix, consumers should look for providers that dispute directly with all three credit bureaus — Equifax, Experian, and TransUnion. Key differentiators include transparency around pricing, realistic timelines for results, and whether the company offers a money-back guarantee. Fast Track Specialists operates in a highly regulated industry under the Credit Repair Organizations Act (CROA), which requires written contracts, a three-day cancellation window, and prohibits upfront fees before services are rendered.

Consumers in the Phoenix, Arizona area who are considering Fast Track Specialists should contact the company directly to discuss their specific situation and get current pricing information. As with any credit repair provider, it is advisable to compare multiple options, verify licensing and credentials, and read recent customer reviews before making a decision.
